# Aadi Projects

> Aadi Projects is a consulting and capital firm that builds, funds, and launches companies across the India–US corridor. It operates three arms under one entity: Consulting (advise and build the working thing), Capital (fee-based advisory plus principal investing, separated by a firewall), and Cofoundry (a venture studio that co-founds and owns companies). Positioning: "Consulting + Capital = Cofoundry." Tagline: "We build what we advise."

## About
Aadi Projects removes the seams between advice, capital, and building. The same firm can advise a company, prepare and fund a raise, and co-found a venture — one accountable relationship across the India–US corridor. It presents itself without logo walls, AUM, or headcount; the credibility is in the thesis, method, and work. Four operating ventures prove the model: Chief Navigators, TeamBeam (India + USA), WeFight, and Errored Coin. Single contact: team@aadiprojects.com.

## Consulting
- [Consulting](https://www.aadiprojects.com/consulting): Advise and build — 14 service lines in four groups.
- [Build](https://www.aadiprojects.com/consulting/build): Digital/Data/AI, Innovation, Operations.
- [People](https://www.aadiprojects.com/consulting/people): Organisation & People, Transformation, Family Business.
- [Growth](https://www.aadiprojects.com/consulting/growth): Marketing/Sales/Customer, Cost/Pricing/Revenue.
- [Strategy & Counsel](https://www.aadiprojects.com/consulting/strategy-counsel): Strategy, Corporate Finance, M&A, Risk, Market Entry, Sustainability.

## Capital
- [Capital](https://www.aadiprojects.com/capital): Advisory and principal capital, separated by a firewall.
- [Capital Services](https://www.aadiprojects.com/capital/capital-services): Readiness, financial engineering, narrative, sell-side diligence, structuring, investor matchmaking, transaction execution.
- [Investing](https://www.aadiprojects.com/capital/investing): Principal positions — solopreneurs, early-stage, mid-market, family-business transition, distressed/turnaround, special situations, structures.

## Cofoundry
- [Cofoundry](https://www.aadiprojects.com/cofoundry): The venture studio — co-found, build, and back companies.
- Ventures: [Chief Navigators](https://www.aadiprojects.com/cofoundry/chief-navigators), [TeamBeam](https://www.aadiprojects.com/cofoundry/teambeam), [WeFight](https://www.aadiprojects.com/cofoundry/wefight), [Errored Coin](https://www.aadiprojects.com/cofoundry/errored-coin).

## For Founders
- [For Founders](https://www.aadiprojects.com/for-founders): Readiness, Raise-Ready, Scale, Women Founders.

## The Firm
- [Client Experience](https://www.aadiprojects.com/client-experience) · [Company](https://www.aadiprojects.com/company) · [Contact](https://www.aadiprojects.com/contact)

## Contact
Email: team@aadiprojects.com — the single point of contact. Offices in India and the United States.
